modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to locate office computer via Remote Desktop Connection

full_description_text:  
The user is having trouble finding their office computer when trying to connect through Remote Desktop. They mentioned that it just doesn't show up, which is super frustrating! It seems like they were all set to work remotely but hit this snag instead. Hope we can sort this out quickly!
short_description: Unable to locate office computer via Remote Desktop Connection

It seems like they were all set to work remotely but hit this snag instead. Hope we can sort this out quickly!
